label: shoulder4_night_l_4group_clean400
command: Night L：把肩部奖励收束成4组：静止下垂、动态侧移伸手、防贴边偷懒、左右平衡平滑。目标是在保留 NightK 稳定和不饱和的基础上，把侧移 roll p95 从约0.08拉回0.14-0.18 rad。
note: NightL FourGroupClean: four shoulder reward groups replace the old micro-term stack. The lateral dynamic target is stronger than NightK while boundary protection remains explicit, aiming for visible side reach without raising the static baseline.
